name: Senolytics ClinicalTrials.gov registry surveillance screening follow-up 3

scope.question: Screen ClinicalTrials.gov registry hits for the senolytics active-trials coverage gap, bounded to NCT03430037, NCT03675724, senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms.

screening_rule_set: coverage-repair registry surveillance: include exact deferred fisetin frailty NCTs only when retained ClinicalTrials.gov snapshots support active no-posted-results status; defer other hits without source snapshots.

decisions.source_title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Women
decisions.rationale: Declared deferred fisetin frailty registry; the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshot shows ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION status and no resultsSection.

decisions.source_title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Adults
decisions.rationale: Declared deferred fisetin frailty registry; the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshot shows ENROLLING_BY_INVITATION status and no resultsSection.

decisions.source_title: Fisetin to Improve Vascular Function in Older Adults
decisions.rationale: The target coverage assessment already lists this active no-posted-results trial-watch source.

decisions.source_title: Senolytic Therapy to Modulate the Progression of Alzheimer's Disease (SToMP-AD) Study
decisions.rationale: The target coverage assessment already lists this active no-posted-results trial-watch source.
Direct D+Q senolytics hit discovered by term surveillance, but this bounded context pack did not declare a source-snapshot path for this registry.

decisions.source_title: An Open-Label Intervention Trial to Reduce Senescence and Improve Frailty in Adult Survivors of Childhood Cancer
decisions.rationale: Active direct senolytic hit discovered by term surveillance; source-snapshot-backed status extraction is needed before proposing any no-results record.
Active D+Q Alzheimer's registry hit discovered by term surveillance; source-snapshot-backed status extraction is needed before proposing any no-results record.

decisions.source_title: Senolytics Treatment of Interstitial Lung Disease in Common Variable Immunodeficiency
decisions.rationale: Enrolling-by-invitation fisetin senolytics hit discovered by term surveillance; source-snapshot-backed status extraction is needed before proposing any no-results record.

decisions.source_title: Senolytics To slOw Progression of Sepsis (STOP-Sepsis) Trial
decisions.rationale: Recruiting fisetin senolytics hit discovered by term surveillance; source-snapshot-backed status extraction is needed before proposing any no-results record.
Active D+Q senolytics hit discovered by term surveillance; source-snapshot-backed status extraction is needed before proposing any no-results record.

blocking_issues: Additional active/recruiting senolytic registry hits were identified but not converted into no-results records because no retained source snapshots were declared or created for those registries in this bounded worker.
summary: Included NCT03430037 and NCT03675724 because retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshots support active/enrolling-by-invitation no-posted-results status. Marked existing NCT06133634 and NCT04685590 as duplicates of the target coverage assessment. Deferred additional active/recruiting senolytic, fisetin, and D+Q hits until source-snapshot-backed follow-up.
next_actions: Create a follow-up context pack for deferred direct active/recruiting ClinicalTrials.gov hits from this screening run.
Do not add no-results records for deferred hits until their own ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshots are retained.
